markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content refresh strategy and plan the contract renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Refresh Strategy:** Refreshing high-value pages (e.g., "About PV") that lost significant traffic (e.g., -6k views) to regain rankings for core location terms.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Video Integration:** Embed existing Vimeo tour videos into articles to improve SEO and user engagement; also upload to YouTube to capture new organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [**Renewal Plan:** Create a shared Google Slides deck summarizing year-one performance (articles, keywords, organic revenue) to support the contract renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Refresh Strategy

  - [Performance is improving, partly due to seasonality (entering high season).](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [**Focus:** Refreshing older content to boost LLM visibility and address traffic drops.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [**"About" Pages:** Pages for PV and Cabo lost significant traffic (e.g., PV's "Time to Visit" page lost 6k views).](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
          - [**Challenge:** Refreshing these pages risks keyword cannibalization with existing blog articles.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
          - [**Solution:** Use synonyms for section headers (e.g., "Cancun at Night" vs. "Cancun Nightlife") to differentiate content.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [**Event Pages:** Require manual research for 2026 dates.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
          - [**Action:** Add the year to titles/meta titles (e.g., "Events in PV 2026") to improve search relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
          - [**Process:** Update known events first, then research harder-to-find ones.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

### Video Integration for SEO

  - [New tour videos are embedded on tour pages (e.g., Extreme Adventure).](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [**Source:** Vimeo, chosen to avoid YouTube's post-video thumbnails.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Opportunity 1: Embed in Articles**](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [**Action:** Mariana will embed Vimeo videos in relevant articles.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Sanity may not accept raw embed codes.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [**Workaround:** Use the existing embed code from tour pages.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**Opportunity 2: Leverage YouTube for Traffic**](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Action:** Upload videos to YouTube to capture new organic traffic from users researching destinations.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Optimization:** Carlos suggested optimizing YouTube titles/descriptions with links to tour pages and articles.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)

### Contract Renewal & Performance Deck

  - [**Goal:** Create a presentation for general management to support the contract renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [**Format:** A concise, graphic-rich PDF/Google Slides deck.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [**Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [Key metrics: articles produced, keywords ranking, position improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [Organic revenue growth (Isabel to add).](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [Mariana will adapt the existing performance memo into the deck.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [The deck will be shared with the renewal contract.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mariana:**](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [Refresh "About" pages using the synonym strategy to avoid keyword cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [Embed Vimeo tour videos into relevant articles.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [Create the performance deck in Google Slides and share with Isabel.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [**Isabel:**](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [Add organic revenue data to the shared performance deck.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [**Lu:**](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [Post the request in the WhatsApp group for the team to share new event info with Mariana.](https://fathom.video/share/-DiL3g8-a1dPthtxWPCSpNEZaCz9BDi1?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
